capabilities.notes: Boston Red Sox @ Los Angeles Angels contest 16 and specs 36/37/38 passed target identity, allowlist, odds, and runway gates.
SDK/CLI v0.10.0, MM head 6f3ccc1 with strict allowlist / own-state / bounded-approval coverage, installed MM SDK v0.9.0, and ancillary repo heads were verified.
Expected-address checks passed for ospex-stage-maker-b, ospex-stage-maker-a, and ospex-flow-a; public balances were sufficient and allowances were bounded.
Only bounded USDC approvals were used; no unlimited approvals were created.
Candidates --allowlist-only returned quote-ready rows for contest 16 and all seeded markets; dry run stayed target-scoped with seedSpeculations=false.
Tiny live moneyline, spread, and total commitments posted under strict contest allowlist [16], seedSpeculations=false.
A controlled taker filled one live MM spread quote for contest 16.
Telemetry captured the controlled fill without unknown-own-fill, owner-mapping, or divergence safety events; a startup stream-health hold cleared before controlled fill.
Final public/API/MM visible-open exposure is zero, target active/pending/claimable positions are zero after postgame, and no orphan MM process remained.
A scratch-state dry-run/cold-start probe loaded state cleanly and did not create duplicate live exposure; live CLI reads remained zero-open.
Official final score was verified and contest 16 scored via R5/CRE using CLI v0.10.0 score --wait.
Moneyline, spread, and total speculations 36/37/38 settled to expected winning sides.
Winning controlled positions were claimed, losing positions were no-op/not claimable, and final target positions are zero.
Tiny manual/live risk plus protocol fees stayed within the Phase 1 Block B low-cap budget; lifecycle transactions are summarized.

transactions.purpose: Create contest 16 for Boston Red Sox @ Los Angeles Angels

Fully match tiny manual spread seed for contest 16 speculation 37

Claim stage-maker-a winning position for speculation 37 side upper
Claim stage-maker-a winning position for speculation 38 side upper
Claim stage-maker-b winning position for speculation 37 side upper

verdict.label: FULL_GREEN
verdict.reason: The v0.10.0/R5 MM #146 strict-allowlist Phase 1 Block B run for Boston Red Sox @ Los Angeles Angels completed the full lifecycle: contest 16 was created and verified; moneyline, spread, and total speculations 36/37/38 were manually seeded and fully filled with zero residual seed exposure; the market maker posted tiny live quotes under strict contest allowlist [16] with seedSpeculations=false; one controlled live spread quote was filled; visible quotes were soft-cancelled or expired; final open commitments were zero; official final score Boston Red Sox 7 / Los Angeles Angels 5 was verified; contest 16 was scored through R5/CRE; target speculations were settled, winning controlled positions were claimed, and final target active/pending/claimable positions are zero. Caveat: startup own-state stream-health hold cleared before controlled fill and left zero residual exposure.
